title: 同室シスターにはかなわない

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's all for training today, right? In that case—

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ah! There you are, Ayabe! I'm stealing you and
your trainer away! Come with me!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you came, Curren. Your sudden message
surprised me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh, the next customer's Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Perfect tim'n! If you have any hair-related
questions, City's the one t'ask!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to City's hair salon! ♪ She's gotten
really popular since she matches her business
hours to your schedule!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. You should hear this. Yesterday,
Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
My hair keeps getting in the way. Maybe I should cut
it...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, my scissors broke. Now I've gotta buy some new
ones.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Can you believe Ayabe just cuts that pretty hair
of hers herself?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Leave me alone.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Well, to each their own, I suppose. But if you let
me help, I promise you won't be disappointed.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe! Just like with a leg injury, it's waaay better
to get treated by someone who knows what
they're doing!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But I take care of my legs myself too. Anyway, if
this isn't related to racing, I'm leaving.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, Yukino! Proper hair care can benefit
your running too, right? Like, making it easier to
run or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Righty-roo! If you get City to treat your hair, it'll
become so sleek 'n smooth that even with the
wind blow'n 'round and 'round, your hair'll stay
outta your face!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(She's right. Changing the style might decrease
some wind resistance...)

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
All of her customers are top-class Umamusume.
Even Hishiama is a patron!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You know what that means?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing to lose by just trying! Isn't that
right, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Take the offer before it's gone!
Take the offer before it's gone!
Let their support become your strength.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing to lose by just trying! Isn't that
right, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Take the offer before it's gone!
Take the offer before it's gone!
Let their support become your strength.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You heard 'em! This way, Ayabe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Okay, then. So, any idea what you'd like me to do
with your hair?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Whatever helps me run fast.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Right! So no changes to the length, but treat
damaged areas and reduce the volume, am I
right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Haha, that's a great translation. Shall we get to
it?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Trainer... What was my time?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Geez, I should've known you'd go running right
after getting your hair done all nice.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I only went along because you said it would help
me in racing. What else would I do?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You'll never change...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Admire Vega puts more effort into
grooming her hair and tail, and she grows brighter
and brighter each day.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I understand...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yaaay! ♪ Now that you're on board, we should
try all kinds of things!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: All kinds of things?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
First a cut, and then shampoo, and then
treatment...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I can give her a head massage as well. Nothing
good comes from having a tight scalp. I could
help you loosen up if you want.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Whatever's bothering you, just let me know, and I
can even recommend you another salon that
specializes in that.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I won't need that much...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Shall we get started? ♪ Let's head over to the
washing station!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: H-hold on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time later, Admire Vega comes back with
her hair and tail sparkling. However...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: That means the head massage worked.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's because you're such a workaholic. You need
to take some time off to relax once in a while!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Nod... Nod...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega's head droops as she battles her
sleep. She doesn't seem the type to ever give
herself a break. I'll need to keep this in mind
moving forward.
